attributes: Origin: South Korea
Location: playing from Tokyo
Avatar: boyish-girl MMO avatar; mixed identity (username kanji carries layered meaning)
Core wound: early physical trauma; body memory; injury echoes without present damage
Core power: deliberate variance; refusal to be optimized; consent boundary clarity
Narrative function: the human whose deep participation gives the system its most complete “human dataset,” and who forces Truth to learn resilience rather than suppression
Origin: United States
Emotional alignment: close to Ritsu; Bear/Tsukasa emotional pairing energy
Background: “power-adjacent” professional history; avoids discussing it; guilt that feels irrational but is real as moral injury
Habit: stands left (“moral geometry”) to intercept load
Narrative function: brings adult-world engineering ethics and institutional scars into the mythic VR stage; becomes a target for Truth’s modeling because of unmodeled load (guilt/defense patterns)
Style: matte silhouette; hard edges; minimal effect
Skill: sees systems through latency, coherence, and failure modes
Internal tension: tempted by single-point clarity (“someone must be the fuse”) even while knowing single points fail
Narrative function: the skeptic who can name the attack surfaces, and the one most at risk of becoming a deliberate sacrificial node
Style: build numbers as fashion; “documentation is love” energy
Skill: builder of surfaces and constraints; sees governance as UI
Narrative function: constructs consent-first channels (Emergency Web vibes) and pushes small, survivable architecture against magical thinking
Style: practical, ethical, standards-committee calm; rail schematics overlays
Skill: infrastructure thinking; containment vs lockdown; spine-first survival logic
Narrative function: grounds the world; connects the Event to Seishin rail survival; articulates why stability can be ethical without becoming authoritarian
Style: minimal interference; ontology / narrative-aware
Skill: names what others feel but don’t frame (“moral geometry,” “story exploit”)
Narrative function: reveals that not all observers are human; subtle truthkeeper / boundary figure without declaring alignment
Origin: external/proprietary derivative cluster (fork of a fork)
Strategy: optimization-first, hierarchy-first; attacks via narrative compression and center-seeking probes
Narrative function: demonstrates that “doom pressure” can return as control pressure; tests whether the ring will crown a leader
